title: Mexican Quesadilla
description: A delicious Mexican-inspired quesadilla filled with xtra cheese, citrusy chicken, and fernbrake greens. Perfect for a quick and easy lunch or dinner.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with mexican seasoning and cook in a pan with olive oil until browned and cooked through.
In a separate pan, warm the tortillas over medium heat for 1-2 minutes on each side.
Assemble the quesadillas by placing a slice of chicken and some fernbrake greens onto half of each tortilla, then topping with xtra cheese.
Fold the tortillas in half and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes on each side, until the cheese is melted and the tortillas are crispy.
Cut into wedges and serve hot.
